name: run_scanvi_annotate
description: Transfer cell-type labels to unlabeled single cells with scANVI (semi-supervised single-cell annotation; Xu 2021 / scvi-tools, Gayoso 2022). Pretrains scVI on a raw-count matrix, refines it semi-supervised on the known labels, then predicts a cell type for every cell and returns the predictions for the previously-unlabeled cells. Input is a server-accessible .h5ad of raw UMI counts whose `labels_key` obs column holds known cell types for some cells and the `unlabeled_category` sentinel (default 'Unknown') for the cells to annotate.

adata_path.description: Server-accessible path or URL to an .h5ad AnnData of RAW UMI counts.

labels_key.description: obs column holding known cell-type labels for some cells and the unlabeled_category sentinel for the cells to annotate.

unlabeled_category.description: Value in labels_key marking unlabeled cells (default 'Unknown').

n_unlabeled.description: Number of cells that were unlabeled (labels_key == unlabeled_category) and got predicted.

predicted_labels.description: Predicted cell types for the previously-unlabeled cells (omitted if n_cells > 5000).

label_counts.description: Mapping of predicted label -> count over the previously-unlabeled cells.

cell_ids.description: obs_names of the previously-unlabeled cells, aligned with predicted_labels (omitted if n_cells > 5000).

error.description: Error description if the run failed.
